parameters.name: observation_template_ids
parameters.description: IDs of all Company Observation Templates specified for bulk update

observation_title.description: Title to be used for Observations created from this template

localized_name.description: Localized name for Company Observation Type

company_active.description: Flag denoting if the Company Observation Type is available for use

active.description: Flag denoting if the Current Observation Type is available for use

kind.description: Description of whether the Observation Type belongs to a company or project

parent_inactive.description: Always false, since Company Observation Types do not have a parent

in_use.description: Flag denoting if current Observation Type is in use

name_translations.description: A translated name for the current Observation Type

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Trade

trade_id.description: The ID of the Company Observation Template's Trade
